final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional poster for cross-border e-commerce sales, designed for platform advertising, with layered typography and product-obscured text in a visually dense yet controlled composition.

Style/medium: promotional poster with the typographic exuberance of layered graphic design, balancing commercial urgency with visual rhythm
Composition: 16:9 horizontal format, bold artistic typography layered at varying depths, product or subject partially obscuring some letterforms to create spatial tension
Subject: promotional messaging with stacked and overlapping type treatments, product element positioned to interrupt and interact with text layers
Scene/backdrop: commercial promotional context with depth created through typographic layering and strategic obscuration
Lighting/mood: the energetic pulse of a sales event, dynamic but not chaotic
Color palette: high-contrast commercial palette with disciplined color blocking to maintain legibility amid complexity
Materials/textures: crisp vector typography with subtle dimensional depth, clean product photography integration
Text (verbatim): 跨境电商促销
Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio, complex but not cluttered, intentional product-to-text overlap, artistic stacked typography
Avoid: actual visual chaos, illegible text, generic stock-photo aesthetic, decorative noise without purpose
